description: Sequential screening for housing, food, and transportation needs, then routes to matching community resources.

metadata.label: Needs Intake
metadata.description: Collect self-reported social determinant needs from the patient.

metadata.label: Housing Need?
metadata.description: Determine if the patient has identified a housing need.

metadata.label: Housing Resources
metadata.description: Compile local housing assistance programs and shelters.

params.llm_prompt: List community housing resources for someone in {zip_code}.

metadata.label: Food Need?
metadata.description: Determine if the patient has identified a food insecurity need.

metadata.label: Food Resources
metadata.description: Compile local food banks, SNAP assistance, and meal programs.

params.llm_prompt: List community food resources for someone in {zip_code}.

metadata.label: Transportation Need?
metadata.description: Determine if the patient needs transportation assistance.

metadata.label: Transportation Resources
metadata.description: Compile medical transportation and transit assistance programs.

params.llm_prompt: List community transportation resources for someone in {zip_code}.

metadata.label: Navigator Referral
metadata.description: Hand off compiled resource list to a Community Equity Navigator for follow-up.
